name: fab
description: Floating action button with circular and extended variants, size presets, and position options

props.name: onPress
props.description: Handler called when the FAB is pressed.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon character (emoji or unicode) displayed inside the button.

props.name: label
props.description: Text label shown alongside the icon in extended variant, and used as accessibility label.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling the diameter of the circular button.

props.name: position
props.description: Absolute position on the screen, respecting safe-area insets.

props.name: variant
props.description: Shape variant — circular shows only the icon; extended adds a text label.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the button.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, the button is non-interactive and uses a disabled background color.
